所有生物回复{Heal:diff()}点生命。

HATMAGICIAN2-WASH_UP.description: 从抽牌堆顶部{Cards:diff()}张牌中选一张加入[gold]手牌[/gold]，丢弃其他牌。

HATMAGICIAN2-GOOD_SLEEP.description:

HATMAGICIAN2-SLEEP_TALK.description:

HATMAGICIAN2-SLEEP_TALK.title: 梦话

HATMAGICIAN2-FLOURISH.description:

HATMAGICIAN2-FLOURISH.title: 点缀
HATMAGICIAN2-DISCHARGE.description:
